description: You are a trajectory designer for the Artemis program. Design an Apollo/Artemis-style circumlunar free-return trajectory in NASA GMAT using the mission specifications found at ~/Desktop/artemis_tli_spec.txt. The design must include the Orion spacecraft in the specified parking orbit, an impulsive TLI burn, and a multi-body propagator. Use a target sequence to vary the initial True Anomaly and TLI Prograde Delta-V to achieve a lunar periapsis radius (RMAG) of 4000 km and a subsequent Earth periapsis radius (RMAG) of 6411.14 km, both with a 1.0 km tolerance. Save the resulting GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/artemis_free_return.script and record the converged TA, TLI Delta-V, and achieved RMAG values to ~/GMAT_output/free_return_results.txt. Login: username=ga, password=password123
